note: delegate=cover (Permission::ProtocolAuthorization, kind delegate — staker delegates Unicorn Power; ScopeBall-core permission primitive). register/setDefaultFarm/updateBalances=exclude (delegatee share-token creation / admin / internal pod callback).

0x5c19a95c.name: delegate
0x5c19a95c.reason: staker delegates Unicorn Power to delegatee -> Permission::ProtocolAuthorization{protocol_name=one_inch_power_pod, permission=delegate, authorized=delegatee, is_authorized=true}. single_emit. C-audit gap closed.

0x3ffbd47f.name: register
0x3ffbd47f.reason: creates a delegatee share-token (name,symbol) — an operator/delegatee-setup action, not a regular staker's pre-sign delegation. Operator-side.

0x3c3f3c23.name: setDefaultFarm
0x3c3f3c23.reason: admin — sets the default farm pod.

0x7a1f1aa9.name: updateBalances
0x7a1f1aa9.reason: internal pod balance callback (called by the staking contract on stake/unstake), not a user pre-sign action.
